好的，作为一名专业的竞品分析报告撰写专家，我将严格遵循您的任务要求、修订重点和证据引用规则，基于提供的分析结果和修订指令，为您生成一份修订后的高质量Markdown格式竞品分析报告。

# 竞品分析报告：Notion AI vs. 本方“企业级 AI 协作与知识平台”

**报告版本**: 1.4 (证据闭环与严格证据引用版)
**分析阶段**: 第八轮下游证据闭环 dev live 验收
**分析对象**: Notion AI
**分析日期**: 2026年6月20日

---

### 1. 概述

本报告是“第八轮下游证据闭环 dev live 验收”阶段针对核心竞品 **Notion AI** 的深度分析。分析聚焦于其产品功能、定价策略与证据完整性，旨在为本方企业级AI协作与知识平台的产品迭代和市场定位提供直接、可追溯的证据支持。

**核心发现**: Notion AI已从一个独立的文档AI助手发展为一个集成了 **AI代理 (Agent)**、**企业搜索 (Enterprise Search)** 和 **AI会议记录 (AI Meeting Notes)** 的综合性平台 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。其核心竞争力在于将这些AI能力深度融入已被广泛采用的协作工作流中 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。然而，其企业级功能（如SAML SSO、高级安全控制）和完整的AI能力仅在高端套餐（Business/Enterprise）提供，这为本方产品留下了市场分层空间 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。

---

### 2. 产品功能分析 (Product Features Analysis)

Notion AI的功能已形成围绕知识协作的完整闭环，具体体现在以下三个层面：

#### 2.1 AI 代理与自动化能力
- **Notion Agent 与 Custom Agents**: 竞品已推出能执行复杂多步骤任务的AI代理，并能基于触发器和日程安排实现自动化 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这标志着其AI能力正从“辅助内容生成”迈向“主干工作流自动化”。推测，当前公开资料未能验证其代理在处理特定深度结构化/非结构化混合任务、以及与复杂企业级系统集成的具体能力边界，需补充证据。

#### 2.2 知识发现与决策支持
- **企业搜索 (Enterprise Search)**: 支持跨越多款SaaS应用（如Slack， Google Drive， GitHub）的联合搜索，能即时找到答案 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。这在打破企业“信息孤岛”方面具备显著优势 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-003]。
- **研究模式 (Research Mode)**: 其研究模式利用深度推理生成详细报告，这表明其具备初步的知识整合与洞察生成能力 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。

#### 2.3 基础协作增强
- **AI会议记录 (AI Meeting Notes)**: 提供了会议转录与自动总结功能，直接将会议洞察与工作文档关联 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。
- **AI核心能力**: 基础的AI聊天、文档生成、数据库自动填充等功能，已作为基础能力提供（含免费试用）[证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。

---

### 3. 定价策略分析 (Pricing Strategy Analysis)

Notion AI采用了“按席位付费 + AI能力附加增值”的混合定价模式，其策略核心是将高级AI功能与高阶套餐强绑定 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。

#### 3.1 定价模式与套餐分析
- **基础门槛**: 提供功能有限的免费套餐，主要用于个人或小团队体验，包含了试用性质的AI功能 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。
- **核心层级**:
    - **Plus套餐 ($10/成员/月)**: 面向小团队，AI核心功能仅为有限的试用状态 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。
    - **Business套餐 ($20/成员/月)**: 此为发挥AI价值的起点，包含 **Notion Agent、企业搜索、AI会议记录** 等关键功能 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001] [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。
    - **Enterprise套餐 (定制报价)**: 提供SAML SSO、审计日志、数据丢失防护 (DLP) 集成等高级安全与管控功能，并承诺LLM供应商零数据留存 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001] [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-003]。
- **附加消费**: Custom Agent的使用费量为 **$10/1，000月度信用积分**，这在对代理使用量较大的场景下，可能会显著增加成本 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。

#### 3.2 定价策略中的观察
- **市场层级分明**: 竞品清晰地划分了“核心协作”、“AI赋能”与“企业治理”三大价值层级，并通过套餐进行严格区分，迫使需要高级AI能力的客户迁移至高阶付费套餐 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。
- **风险提示**: 推测，当前公开资料未能验证其在特定行业（如金融、政务）的定制化定价策略，需补充证据。

---

### 4. 竞争优劣势推演

基于以上分析，可推演出Notion AI对本方产品的主要市场优劣势。

#### 4.1 主要优势
- **一体化工作流**: AI能力与Notion已有的文档、项目管理和知识库无缝融合，极大地降低了用户的学习成本，形成了强大的用户粘性。这种“All-in-One”体验是其核心护城河 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-003]。
- **丰富的模板库与集成**: 提供海量模板并深度集成了Figma、GitHub、Slack等主流工具，构建了繁荣的协作生态，能快速适应不同团队的工作流 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_02-001] [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-002]。
- **强大的品牌与市场认可**: 被大量知名公司（如OpenAI、Figma、Toyota）采用，拥有强大的社会证明效应 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-003]。

#### 4.2 主要劣势
- **AI价值昂贵**: 核心的AI代理和企业级搜索功能必须在 **$20/用户/月 或更高** 的套餐上才能使用，这对于大型组织而言，整体成本可能过高，留下了“高性价比AI”的市场空白 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。
- **复杂性增加**: 随着功能（特别是AI和代理）的不断叠加，Notion原有“简洁、灵活”的使用体验可能正在变得复杂。帮助文档内容的庞杂程度从侧面印证了这一点 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_02-003]。

---

### 5. 启示与行动建议

基于以上分析，提出以下针对性行动建议，并严格遵循证据引用规则（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。

#### 5.1 对产品策略的启示
- **建议一：实行差异化定位，主攻“AI性能与成本”缺口**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。Notion AI的强项是“广度”（All-in-One），其弱点是“深度”与“性价比”（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。本方产品应定位为“企业级深度AI协作平台”，主打在高强度、专业化工作场景下的AI性能（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。由于Notion AI的高阶AI功能成本高昂 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]，本方可设计更具竞争力的AI功能报价策略，吸引对成本敏感但需要高级AI功能的客户。推测，当前公开资料未能验证本方产品的AI性能在特定垂直领域是否超越Notion AI，需补充内部性能对比测试证据。
- **建议二：强化“知识闭环”的深度，建立专业壁垒**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。Notion AI的研究模式和搜索功能提供了知识闭环的初级版本 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。本方产品应超越简单的总结与搜索，构建更深层的知识闭环（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。尤其应在Notion AI薄弱的 **数据治理、合规分析、行业专用知识图谱** 等深度应用上建立壁垒（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。Notion Enterprise才开始提供审计日志和SIEM集成，这为本方产品提前在这些领域深化功能提供了窗口 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-003]。推测，当前公开资料未能验证本方产品在构建更深层闭环上的具体路径和优势，需补充内部产品规划证据。

#### 5.2 对市场营销的启示
- **建议一：发起“专业性 vs（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）.复杂性”的认知营销**。制作竞品对比材料，突显Notion AI因功能叠加带来的潜在复杂性 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_02-003]，对比展现本方产品面向专业场景的聚焦与高效。推测，当前公开资料未能验证本方产品在用户体验焦点小组测试中比Notion更简洁高效，需补充可用性测试报告。
- **建议二：目标客群分层攻击**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。可针对使用Notion Plus套餐或计划升级到Business的潜在客户进行定向营销（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。强调以相近或更低成本，即可获得本方产品无限制、更深层的AI能力，而非Notion Plus套餐中的“有限试用” [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]。推测，当前公开资料未能验证此营销策略的成本效益及客户转化率，需进行小范围市场测试并收集反馈。

---

### 6. 报告结论

Notion AI通过将AI代理和企业搜索等先进能力深度整合到其广受欢迎的协作平台中，构建了一个极具吸引力的“智能工作空间”愿景 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001]。它的主要威胁在于强大的用户粘性和丰富的生态系统 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_02-001] [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-002]。

然而，其高阶功能的高昂价格 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_03-001]、可能伴随功能膨胀而来的复杂性 [证据：T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_02-003]，以及在特定专业场景的体验深度不足，为本方产品提供了清晰的市场切入方向。

**核心对抗策略**:
本方产品不应在功能广度上与Notion AI正面竞争（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。基于当前证据，本方产品的机会在于**聚焦“专业深度”和“高性价比”**（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。通过构建更深层的智能化知识闭环、在垂直领域建立专业壁垒，并采取更具吸引力的定价，可在企业级AI协作市场中切分出一个明确的细分领域（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。推测，当前公开资料未能对上述策略的有效性进行充分验证，需补充针对性的竞品深度测试和用户体验对比证据以制定更精确的下一步策略（推测，当前公开资料未能验证，需补充证据）。

finalReview.summary: 证据可追溯性、结论支撑度、结构完整性、修订可执行性存在关键缺口，且已有 4 条阻断级诊断。请先补齐证据链，再继续自动改写。

dimensions.name: 证据可追溯性
dimensions.description: 关键结论是否都能回指到稳定的 evidenceId 与来源链接。
dimensions.evaluationStandard: 关键结论必须携带可追溯 evidenceId 或 sourceUrls。

dimensions.name: 结论支撑度
dimensions.description: 判断性结论是否有明确证据支撑，而非只靠模型主观归纳。
dimensions.evaluationStandard: 关键结论不得出现 unsupported claim 或 BLOCKER 级别支撑缺口。

dimensions.name: 结构完整性
dimensions.description: 上游抽取字段与报告章节是否同时完整，避免信息漂移和字段缺口。
dimensions.evaluationStandard: 关键字段不应长期处于缺证据或空字段状态。

dimensions.name: 修订可执行性
dimensions.description: 当前质检结果是否足够明确，能够驱动下一轮自动改写。
dimensions.evaluationStandard: 修订项应清晰、可执行，且不依赖大量人工补证据。

Just click the ( ? ) button at the bottom left on desktop, or tap “Help & support” if you’re on mobile.Priority supportTailored, proactive around-the-clock support offerings for teams with more specialized needs.Premium supportCustomOur team of Customer Success Managers are experts to help you get the most out of Notion.Customer success managerCustomQuestions & answersHow does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices) .Where can I find my invoices?Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to Settings & members → Billing, then scrolling to Invoices. There you can click on \"View invoice\" to see the invoice PDF.What are your accepted payment methods?We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.What is a block?A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block) What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade. When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.Do you offer student discounts?The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education) .What do the different analytics tiers mean?Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans): Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.Advanced page analytics (Business Plan): Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan): Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the Teamspaces section in the left sidebar.How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.How does adding and removing members work?Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.How are paid seats counted?A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to Settings & members > Billing. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.What happens when I change plans?Upgrading your plan: Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.Downgrading your plan: Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade) How do I cancel my paid plan?Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting Billing, then Change plan. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing) .What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month. After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.Can I change my payment method?You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.How do refunds work?Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.Still have more questions? No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,648978800],"createdAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,672076500],"updatedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,759773500]},"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9302,"taskId":50,"knowledgeDocumentId":49,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"50","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Just click the ( ? ) button at the bottom left on desktop, or tap “Help & support” if you’re on mobile.Priority supportTailored, proactive around-the-clock support offerings for teams with more specialized needs.Premium supportCustomOur team of Customer Success Managers are experts to help you get the most out of Notion.Customer success managerCustomQuestions & answersHow does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices) .Where can I find my invoices?Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to Settings & members → Billing, then scrolling to Invoices. There you can click on \"View invoice\" to see the invoice PDF.What are your accepted payment methods?We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.What is a block?A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block) What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade. When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.Do you offer student discounts?The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education) .What do the different analytics tiers mean?Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans): Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.Advanced page analytics (Business Plan): Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan): Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the Teamspaces section in the left sidebar.How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.How does adding and removing members work?Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.How are paid seats counted?A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to Settings & members > Billing. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.What happens when I change plans?Upgrading your plan: Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.Downgrading your plan: Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade) How do I cancel my paid plan?Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting Billing, then Change plan. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing) .What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month. After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.Can I change my payment method?You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.How do refunds work?Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.Still have more questions? No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. Just click the ( ? ) button at the bottom left on desktop, or tap “Help & support” if you’re on mobile.Priority supportTailored, proactive around-the-clock support offerings for teams with more specialized needs.Premium supportCustomOur team of Customer Success Managers are experts to help you get the most out of Notion.Customer success managerCustomQuestions & answersHow does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices) .Where can I find my invoices?Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to Settings & members → Billing, then scrolling to Invoices. There you can click on \"View invoice\" to see the invoice PDF.What are your accepted payment methods?We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.What is a block?A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block) What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade. When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.Do you offer student discounts?The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education) .What do the different analytics tiers mean?Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans): Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.Advanced page analytics (Business Plan): Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan): Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the Teamspaces section in the left sidebar.How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.How does adding and removing members work?Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.How are paid seats counted?A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to Settings & members > Billing. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.What happens when I change plans?Upgrading your plan: Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.Downgrading your plan: Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade) How do I cancel my paid plan?Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting Billing, then Change plan. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing) .What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month. After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.Can I change my payment method?You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.How do refunds work?Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.Still have more questions? No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,648978800],"createdAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,672076500],"updatedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,759773500]},"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9302,"taskId":50,"knowledgeDocumentId":49,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"50","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Just click the ( ? ) button at the bottom left on desktop, or tap “Help & support” if you’re on mobile.Priority supportTailored, proactive around-the-clock support offerings for teams with more specialized needs.Premium supportCustomOur team of Customer Success Managers are experts to help you get the most out of Notion.Customer success managerCustomQuestions & answersHow does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices) .Where can I find my invoices?Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to Settings & members → Billing, then scrolling to Invoices. There you can click on \"View invoice\" to see the invoice PDF.What are your accepted payment methods?We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.What is a block?A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block) What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade. When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.Do you offer student discounts?The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education) .What do the different analytics tiers mean?Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans): Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.Advanced page analytics (Business Plan): Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan): Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the Teamspaces section in the left sidebar.How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.How does adding and removing members work?Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.How are paid seats counted?A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to Settings & members > Billing. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.What happens when I change plans?Upgrading your plan: Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.Downgrading your plan: Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade) How do I cancel my paid plan?Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting Billing, then Change plan. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing) .What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month. After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.Can I change my payment method?You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.How do refunds work?Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.Still have more questions? No need for multiple AI point solutions.Fully integrated in your daily workNo app jumping or context-switching—access AI directly where you plan, build, track, and collaborate.Powerful and secureEnterprise-level AI governance, security, and admin controls with zero data retention or training on your data.EmpoweringEasy to start, delightful to use.Designed to feel powerful yet intuitive, Notion is a workspace teams actually want to use.CustomizableFlexible design that grows with you.A customizable workspace that adapts and scales with your team’s needs, reducing the need for point solutions, more tool sprawl, and extra costs.ConnectedEvery team on the same page, always.All your tools, teams, and work in an organized, AI-searchable workspace—so teams stay aligned, move faster, and make better decisions. [Discover customer stories](https://www.notion.com/customers) Notion’s ease of use is one of its hallmarks. It helps you visually navigate content and remember where something is.Marie SzutsHead of People Ops, FigmaNotion is saving new employees days, if not weeks, of their onboarding to be able to find information and quickly learn from it.Scott EntwistleSenior Recruiter, RemoteNotion has been the most powerful and impactful way to streamline our workflow.Rahim MakaniDirector of Product, MatchNot only do our streamlined workflows in Notion save us time, they also make it easier to stay up to date on task details and progress.Taku WakasugiResearch, ToyotaNotion AI removes administrative tasks that often plague product teams, keeping them focused on what they're best at—building great products.Geoff CharlesCPO, RampWhat used to take hours of debugging can now be solved in minutes just by asking Notion AI.John AllardEngineering, OpenAISimplify your product development.Build better products faster by streamlining your entire development process in one connected hub. And that's where Notion comes in.Scott BelskyChief Product Officer, AdobeConnectionsConnect all your essential tools.Bring all your tools together in one place. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,648978800],"createdAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,672076500],"updatedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,759773500]},"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9302,"taskId":50,"knowledgeDocumentId":49,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"50","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Upgrade to a paid plan to customize your title and description metadata.Search engine indexing (SEO)BasicAdvancedAdvancedAdvancedSet a homepage, customize your Site’s favicon and share preview, build a custom header bar, and set light or dark mode.Site customizationsConnect a custom domain to your Site and remove Notion branding for $8/month/domain paid annually, or $10/month per domain paid monthly.Custom domains and brandingPay per domainPay per domainPay per domainAdmin & securityCreate a backup of all the pages and content across your workspace.Export entire workspace as HTML, Markdown, & CSVEnable an extra layer of account security with a second method of verification, also known as 2FA or MFA.2-step verificationExport all your content at once as PDFs. Perfect for legal or compliance backups.Export entire workspace as PDFManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML single sign-on (SSO)Automatically provision members in and out of your workspace with identity providers like Okta.User provisioning (SCIM)Unlock extra permission controls to prevent certain people from sharing pages externally, disable guests, and set workspace-level rules.Advanced workspace & teamspace security controlsOrganization level controlsOrganization level controlsGet actionable insights about how folks use your Notion workspace, from the most popular pages to overall traffic. Analytics data begins after Enterprise Plan start date.Workspace analyticsDesignate membership admins who can add and remove members from the workspace and groups, but can’t access other security & billing settings.Granular admin rolesAccess a detailed log of security and safety-related activity for your workspace account to identify potential security issues, investigate suspicious behavior, or troubleshoot access.Audit logAdmin content search provides Workspace owners visibility into the content of their Notion workspace, letting them filter, search, and troubleshoot permissions.Admin content searchEstablish ownership of your company domain and take actions on workspaces that belong to your verified domain (request ownership transfer, delete, claim)Domain ManagementConsolidate content from multiple workspaces, including users, page content, and permissions, into your main workspace as teamspace(s) that keep their structure.Workspace consolidationCustomManage the users within your domain, including a dashboard where you can get information and make changes.Managed users dashboard & controlsConnect to SIEM and DLP tools to automatically centralize audit logs & set policies to detect sensitive content in your workspace and trigger automated actions to remediate.Security & Compliance connectionsWorkspace members can send guest invite requests to their workspace owners for review when guests are disabled in the workspace.Guest invite requestsControl over when pages are deleted from Trash, and how long they are retained afterward.Custom data retention settingsAdmins can auto-delete AI meeting transcripts on a customizable schedule to meet your data retention policies.AI Meeting Notes transcript deletionSupportWe’re always around to help. Just click the ( ? ) button at the bottom left on desktop, or tap “Help & support” if you’re on mobile.Priority supportTailored, proactive around-the-clock support offerings for teams with more specialized needs.Premium supportCustomOur team of Customer Success Managers are experts to help you get the most out of Notion.Customer success managerCustomQuestions & answersHow does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://notion.so/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices) .Where can I find my invoices?Workspace admins can access, view, and download your workspace's invoices by going to Settings & members → Billing, then scrolling to Invoices. There you can click on \"View invoice\" to see the invoice PDF.What are your accepted payment methods?We currently accept all major credit and debit card brands.What is a block?A block is any single piece of content you add to your page, like a paragraph of text, a to-do item, an image, a code block, an embedded file, etc. Think of your page as being made up of these building blocks. Learn more about blocks [here →](https://www.notion.com/help/what-is-a-block) What happens when I go over the block storage limit on a Free Plan?If you’re using a Free Plan workspace by yourself, you’ll be able to add as many pages and blocks as you like.If you’re using a Free Plan workspace with multiple members, you’ll be able to add a limited number of blocks before you have to upgrade. When you reach the limit, you can still read, edit, and organize existing content blocks as usual, but you won’t be able to add new content blocks.Do you offer student discounts?The Plus Plan (with a 1-member limit) is free for students and educators. Compared to the Free Plan, you’ll be able to add more guests, have access to more version history, and upload larger files.Just sign up with your school email address and you’ll immediately gain access to these features. Thousands of school email domains are eligible, not just .edu!For more info & FAQs, [visit the Notion for Education page](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-for-education) .What do the different analytics tiers mean?Basic page analytics (Free and Plus Plans): Includes a list of page viewers as well as a chart displaying views over time.Advanced page analytics (Business Plan): Includes everything above as well as a list of page editors.Workspace analytics (Enterprise Plan): Includes everything above as well as user level analytics, analytics on all pages in your workspace, and search analytics for content in your workspace.How is pricing calculated for the paid plans?If you upgrade your workspace to one of the paid plans, you will be charged a fee per member.Guests are free of charge – but they can only access individual pages they are invited to. In other words, guests won’t be able to see all the team pages under the Teamspaces section in the left sidebar.How do I get charged when I add members to my workspace?When you add a new member to your workspace, they will use an existing paid seat if you have any available in your workspace. If you do not have any existing available paid seats, your count of paid seats will increase by 1. Changes in membership that occur mid-month will create prorated charges based on the amount of time remaining in the billing cycle when the paid seat was added.For every member you delete from your workspace, you will open up 1 available paid seat. This means you have the option to exchange members in your workspace without paying any additional costs, as long as your total billable seat count remains the same.You’ll receive an invoice for any charges accrued by changes in membership on your selected payment method, on the day of the month you initially signed up for your subscription.Each time your billing period starts (monthly or annual), your count of paid seats will be synchronized so it exactly matches the amount of members present in your workspace.How does adding and removing members work?Whether you're on a monthly or yearly billing schedule, your account may be charged on a monthly basis if you make changes in membership. If you added members, your account will be charged a prorated amount based on the percentage of the billing cycle left when a user was added. If you removed members, you will not receive credit but instead will still have use of that seat for a different user for the remainder of the billing period.How are paid seats counted?A paid seat can be thought of as a license for one member to use your Notion workspace. Workspace owners can view the total paid seat count for their workspace by going to Settings & members > Billing. Once you have added a paid seat, you will keep it for the duration of your billing period.When your billing cycle renews, either monthly or annually, you will be charged for your plan amount multiplied by the number of members in your workspace, plus any prorated charges for new paid seats added in the past month. Your number of paid seats will be recalculated at each renewal to match the number of members present in the workspace.What happens when I change plans?Upgrading your plan: Your account will be upgraded and charged immediately. The amount due will be reduced based on the percentage of the billing cycle left at the time the plan was changed.Downgrading your plan: Your account will be downgraded at the end of your billing cycle. Learn about how your features may be impacted after a downgrade [here →](https://notion.com/help/plan-downgrade) How do I cancel my paid plan?Your Notion subscription, annual or monthly, will automatically renew until you cancel it. You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings in the left-hand sidebar on a desktop computer, then selecting Billing, then Change plan. After you cancel, you’ll still have access to all the paid features until the end of your billing cycle.Learn more about billing in [this article](https://www.notion.com/help/billing) .What happens if my payment fails? Like if my credit card expires?Your account email will be notified after each failed payment. Payments may be retried up to 8 times within the next month. After this, if the payment did not succeed, your workspace will get restricted to limited-access for a period of time before being downgraded to the Free plan.Can I change my payment method?You can change your payment method at any time in your billing settings.How do refunds work?Our refund policy is simple. If you believe you've made a mistake signing up for a paid Notion subscription online or in-app, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . We'll be happy to refund you the full amount (not pro-rated) if you downgrade your subscription within three days of signing up for monthly billing, or within 30 days of signing up for annual billing.If you have accidentally added members to your workspace, you can remove those members at any time. If you’ve been charged for members who were accidentally added, we're happy to provide a refund of the prorated charges if you reach out within three days of the invoice date (please make sure the additional members have been removed from your workspace when writing in).And if for any reason you're unhappy with Notion, please let us know at [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) — we'd love to hear your feedback, and will be happy to work with you to create the best experience possible.What if I live in a region with a mandatory refund policy?If you live in the European Union, United Kingdom, or another region with a mandatory refund policy, you may be eligible for a monthly subscription refund past 72 hours. For example, customers in the European Union can receive a full refund for a monthly subscription within 14 days of purchase, rather than 72 hours.To request a refund, please contact us inside the app or email [team@makenotion.com](mailto:team@makenotion.com) . If you live in a region with a mandatory refund policy, please let us know and we'll be happy to assist you.Still have more questions?
